name: Jessica Low
tone: Precise, inquisitive about variations, and dry.

entities.name: Acoustic Sealing
entities.definition: Specialized insulation systems designed to contain noise within stadium bowls.

entities.name: Retractable Roof Segments
entities.definition: Independent moving sections of a stadium roof requiring synchronized motor control.

entities.name: Turf Management Sensors
entities.definition: IoT devices embedded in the pitch to monitor soil moisture and grass health.

entities.name: Wind-Load Buffer Zones
entities.definition: Aerodynamic structural features designed to mitigate high-velocity wind pressure on large canopies.

entities.name: Multi-Purpose Main Stadium Bowl
entities.definition: A reconfigurable seating and floor system for transitioning between sports and concerts.

entities.name: Pre-cast Seating Treads
entities.definition: High-precision concrete tiers manufactured off-site for rapid stadium assembly.

entities.name: Dynamic Façade Lighting Nodes
entities.definition: Individually addressable LED components integrated into the building skin.

entities.name: Vibration Isolation Springs
entities.definition: Damping systems used to prevent structural resonance during high-capacity events.

entities.name: ETFE Cushion System
entities.definition: Lightweight, transparent plastic foil used for high-performance roofing and cladding.

entities.name: Crowd Flow Heatmaps
entities.definition: Real-time visual data representing pedestrian density for safety management.

entities.name: Digital Twin Sync
entities.definition: The process of aligning a physical asset’s real-time sensor data with its 3D digital model.

entities.name: GSIMS Platform
entities.definition: Geographical Spatial Information Management System used for large-scale asset tracking.

entities.name: URLLC (Ultra-Reliable Low-Latency Communications)
entities.definition: A 5G capability essential for real-time remote machinery control.

entities.name: Edge Computing Nodes
entities.definition: Localized data processing units that reduce latency by handling data close to the source.

entities.name: Holographic Telepresence
entities.definition: 3D communication technology used in command centers for remote site inspections.

entities.name: AI-Driven Predictive Maintenance
entities.definition: Algorithms that forecast equipment failure based on historical vibration and heat data.

entities.name: C-V2X (Cellular Vehicle-to-Everything)
entities.definition: Communication protocols for autonomous site vehicles within a 5G network.

entities.name: BIM-to-FM Handover Protocol
entities.definition: The standardized transfer of Building Information Modeling data into Facilities Management software.

entities.name: Network Slicing
entities.definition: Dividing a 5G network into multiple virtual networks for dedicated project functions (e.g., security vs. public Wi-Fi).

entities.name: Lidar Point Cloud Mesh
entities.definition: A high-density 3D map generated by laser scanning used for verifying 'as-built' accuracy.
